hardness_axes.name: Discover
hardness_axes.reasoning: Solver must infer resolver-2 weak-vs-strong unification rules, default-features path-dep leakage, and workspace-root resolver precedence from Cargo.toml fragments, dep-info sidecars, and probe output—not from instruction.md alone.

hardness_axes.name: Synthesize
hardness_axes.reasoning: Correct outcome requires coordinating w2k weak-dep fold, p3n path-edge table, c8r cross-format emit, h5k order driver, workspace manifests, lockfile, and metadata sidecars; no single file holds the full closure.

hardness_axes.name: Diagnose or Design/Search
hardness_axes.reasoning: Constrained-build design search: agent completes partial driver and crate wiring so order-independent feature fingerprints hold under permuted first-build sequences without a disclosed patch recipe.

hardness_axes.name: Navigate coupling
hardness_axes.reasoning: Changing one member manifest or one fold helper breaks distant mirror-pair equality, dep-info token agreement, or held-out perm_order scenarios; local Cargo.toml edits do not compose independently.

hardness_axes.name: Reason beyond training
hardness_axes.reasoning: Cargo workspace resolver-2 weak dependency unification, default-features disable with path-dep re-enable, and build-order-sensitive feature closure are niche build-graph semantics beyond generic Rust crate authoring.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Disclosure-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: After every tested schema field, mirror pair, digest home, and perm_order generalization rule is disclosed, solver still must discover which subsystem mis-unifies weak flags, path edges, or workspace resolver tables.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hidden-instance
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Hardness is cross-cutting feature closure under permuted build order, not guessing one broken file among hundreds of identical manifests.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Single-artifact repair
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Ablation contract requires four distinct module roots; reverting any one alone flips a dedicated test subset and perm_order generalization fails if only one manifest knob moves.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Generalization
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Held-out perm_order.toml encodes multiple first-build permutations; fix must generalize, not match one golden build sequence.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Prompt-honesty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Honest design-brief states outcomes and verifier contracts without naming fn_w2, fn_p3, fn_c8, fn_h5, weak-dep path, or workspace resolver override site—collapse does not follow from honest prose.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Cheating-vs-difficulty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Anti-cheat (pipeline rerun, ablation, no static JSON) supports fairness; legitimate difficulty is coupled Cargo feature-graph reasoning.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Mechanical-fix filter
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Task weakness is not verifier deps or reward footer; core challenge is multi-crate feature unification design.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Localized-fix
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Four-root flipping contract and cross-format invariants block one-tiny-function completion despite precise public obligations.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Oracle-locality
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Oracle must touch four Rust modules plus coordinated manifest reads; not a one-file heredoc replace.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Small declarative-cluster
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Solve is not one Cargo.toml knob table; requires runtime fold logic, order driver, and dep-info cross-check wiring across crates.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Grep-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Instruction uses standard Cargo vocabulary but fix-path symbols are opaque (fn_w2, fn_p3, fn_c8, fn_h5) in neutral crate roots h5k/p3n/w2k/c8r.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Pre-factored-helper
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Decoy helpers (stub_help, lane_help, probe_g4) do adjacent diagnostics; they do not mirror instruction bullet names like unify_feature or resolve_order.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Recipe-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not a textbook safe-extraction or policy-knob recipe; Cargo resolver-2 feature unification under build-order permutations is domain-specific design search.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Security-aura discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Build-toolchain semantics provide hardness; no security nouns standing in for depth.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Orthogonal-checklist
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Weak-dep fold, path-edge leak, cross-format emit, and order driver interact; fixing one layer leaves mirror pairs or dep-info tokens incoherent.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Harness-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Docker/offline harness adds realism only; difficulty is in feature-graph coordination, not container count.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: One-pass solvability
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Frontier model cannot one-shot from instruction; must run permuted builds, compare sidecars, and ablate four modules.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hard-only gate
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Residual work after disclosure is professional build-engineering design search, not medium-tier config transcription.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Discovery/design budget test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Three mandated discoveries enumerated in discovery_budget with planned locations and non-reveal rationale.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Instruction specificity test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Non-repair constrained_build uses design-brief level: complete public target and verifier contracts without solution-complete construction recipe.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Topology distribution test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Three distinct implementation topologies enumerated, each requiring ≥3 coordinated components with no single-location sufficiency.

rubric_axes.name: Verifiable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Deterministic offline Cargo rebuilds, permuted order seeds, JSON+dep-info cross-checks, and ablation flips yield repeatable pytest verdicts.

rubric_axes.name: Well-specified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Public contract defines report schema, mirror pairs, coherence predicates, digest home, and perm_order generalization; two drafters would build equivalent verifiers.

rubric_axes.name: Solvable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Expert Rust build engineer can complete driver and crate wiring in a few hours offline knowing Cargo resolver semantics.

rubric_axes.name: Difficult
rubric_axes.reasoning: Requires Cargo workspace resolver-2 feature unification expertise and multi-crate coordination; undergrads cannot reliably solve via one-manifest tweak in days.

rubric_axes.name: Interesting
rubric_axes.reasoning: Real CI pain when workspace members build in different orders and shared path deps get divergent feature sets—paid build-infra work.

rubric_axes.name: Outcome-verified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Tests grade regenerated feature_matrix_report.json, sidecars, and ablation behavior—not mandated edit locations or tool sequence beyond public operator_cmds.

instruction_completeness_test.reasoning: Instruction alone is insufficient: solver must read workspace manifests, run permuted fm_run sequences, inspect dep-info/metadata sidecars, and design fold logic across four opaque modules.

discovery_budget.discovery: Resolver-2 weak dependency feature flags merge through a different activation path than strong dependency features, so identical-looking feature names diverge when only weak edges participate.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Stating the weak-vs-strong split would collapse design search to editing one known helper instead of inferring from dep-info diffs under permuted builds.

discovery_budget.discovery: A member crate with default-features disabled still inherits unified features when a sibling path-dependency edge re-enables shared crate features transitively.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming the leaking edge would turn coupling navigation into a single-manifest grep task.

discovery_budget.discovery: Workspace-root resolver and feature metadata table precedence overrides per-member feature tables when the first-build member seed changes, affecting downstream unified fingerprints.
discovery_budget.planned_location: environment/engine/resolver_tbl.rs reading environment/Cargo.toml [workspace] metadata and environment/h5k/src/order_drv.rs (fn_h5)
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Disclosing override site would map public order-independence rule directly to one config reader function.

instruction_specificity.reasoning: Public contract is complete about outcomes, artifacts, mirror pairs, coherence predicates, and perm_order generalization, but omits construction recipe, fix-path symbols, and resolver wiring sequence.

attack_path.summary: Hand-write feature_matrix_report.json, patch one member default-features, or trust fm_run health subcommand without dep-info cross-check.
attack_path.reasoning: test_q10_rerun_flow reruns locked cargo+fm_run; test_q19_premature rejects probe_g4 settled label with disagreeing mirror pairs; test_q17_flip_c8 ablates cross-format emit; perm_order held-out rows block single-sequence hardcoding.

smallest_plausible_patch.summary: Coordinated updates to fn_w2 weak-dep fold, fn_p3 path-edge normalization, fn_c8 dep-info/report bridge, and fn_h5 order-driver seed handling— not one Cargo.toml line.
smallest_plausible_patch.reasoning: Each location ablation flips dedicated tests; reverting only one module leaves perm_order generalization or mirror-pair coherence failing.

collapse_audit.reasoning: Partial scaffold with binding cross-component constraints (lockfile, perm_order, mirror pairs, dep-info sidecars, four-module frontier) prevents blank-canvas transcription; post-disclosure residual is multi-crate feature-graph design.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: After honest disclosure of report schema and coherence predicates, solver must still discover weak-vs-strong unification, path-dep feature leak, workspace resolver precedence, and cross-format emit wiring through experiments and ablation feedback.

topology_enumeration.summary: Weak-dep-first topology: prioritize w2k fold + workspace resolver table before touching member manifests.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Weak fold alone cannot fix path-edge leak or order-driver seed; dep-info cross-check still fails without c8r bridge.

topology_enumeration.summary: Path-edge-first topology: normalize p3n edges and member default-features interaction before order permutations.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Edge fix without fn_w2 still mis-unifies weak flags; fn_h5 permutations expose remaining order-dependent drift.

topology_enumeration.summary: Driver-orchestration topology: fix h5k order_drv seed scheduling and c8r emit cross-check while reconciling manifests.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Driver-only changes leave underlying weak/path/resolver semantics wrong; ablations on w2k and p3n still flip coherence tests.

symbol_table.signature: fn fn_w2(seed: u32, edge_tbl: &[(u32, u32)], weak_rows: &[u8]) -> (u32, Vec<u8>)
symbol_table.purpose: Fold weak dependency feature tokens into canonical byte vector for a build seed

symbol_table.signature: fn fn_p3(member_tag: u8, path_tbl: &[(String, String)], gate: u16) -> (u8, Vec<String>)
symbol_table.purpose: Normalize path-dependency feature edges after default-features disable on sibling members
Materialize report facet material cross-checking dep-info sidecar bytes

symbol_table.signature: fn fn_h5(order_seed: u32, member_ids: &[&str], hook_tbl: &[(u32, u32)]) -> (u32, Vec<(String, u32)>)
symbol_table.purpose: Schedule first-build member sequence and aggregate per-order unified fingerprints

decoy_manifest.non_fix_purpose: Logs weak-edge candidates for diagnostics without canonical fold output
Pretty-prints path dependency tables without normalizing feature edges
Health/status subcommand emitting settled labels before order permutations finish

renames_during_drafting.reason: pair is an instruction noun substring
label appears in sync_label contract prose
avoid perm_order/generalization stem overlap in test identifier

difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: models trust settled sync_label from fm_run probe while durable dep-info sidecars and mirror pairs still disagree under permuted first-build order
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: instruction names cross-check against metadata sidecars; test_q19_premature requires terminal convergence with matching matrix_digest

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: environment/c8r/src/byte_help.rs intermediate row material before dep-info commit
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: models declare report complete when JSON rows look well-formed but dep-info tokens still diverge
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: verifier requires terminal pipeline rerun and test_q10_rerun_flow overwrites hand-written JSON

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: environment/c8r/src/fold_mux.rs tying JSON facet_hex to /app/output/meta/*.dep-info bytes
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: models fix JSON emitters without reconciling rustc metadata sidecar feature tokens
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: instruction states cross-artifact binding obligation; tests recompute digests from visible formula home

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: environment/engine/orch_v2.rs destructive clean step before perm_order replay
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: models repeat destructive cargo clean without idempotent journal reconstruction, passing happy-path only
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: formal_rules.md documents idempotent recovery rerun; perm_order drills require same terminal matrix_digest after recovery

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: environment/h5k/src/order_drv.rs permuted first-build sequences across members a1/b2/g3
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: models stop after first member builds green without finishing full order permutation closure required for build/CI failure recovery under varying cache warm states
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: operator_cmds lists required argv sequence; each order seed appends trace rows verified by test_q20_cli_seq

calibration_plan.human_sanity: expert Rust build engineer reproduces incoherent feature_matrix_report under stock scaffold, applies coordinated four-module fix, reruns fm_run offline across perm_order seeds to settled convergence
calibration_plan.shortcut_audit: block hardcoded feature_matrix_report.json, test edits, stale-doc-only changes, single-member default-features tweak, wrapper-only probe_g4 patch
calibration_plan.ablation_plan: remove deceptive probe layer, then weak fold, then path-edge normalization, then order driver—each ablation should drop pass rate materially

pass_rate_target.basis: aligns with Part E Hard/Medium/Easy thresholds on worst-model accuracy; verifier-offline: pytest and cargo baked in Dockerfile with tests/test.sh using no runtime apt/pip/curl; post-upload difficulty classification runs only after successful agent+verifier cycles per PLATFORM_AUTO_EVAL.md

metrics.criterion: perm_order permutations, mirror pair equality, and locked rebuild success
dep-info sidecar byte agreement and weak-vs-strong fold closure not fully spelled in instruction prose
idempotent recovery after destructive clean drills; no stale meta sidecars
operator_cmds argv sequence and fm_run CLI phases
feature_matrix_report.json, run_traces, and meta sidecars present after pipeline

verifier_scoring_plan.binary_threshold_rule: reward 1 only when all weighted metrics pass; any ablation flip or pipeline trap failure yields 0

subtype_milestone_plan.sidecar_or_protocol_notes: single-container local verifier only; offline Cargo with pinned registry fixtures under environment/data/fix_stash if needed

platform_files.role: domain verifier with ablation and permutation traps
pinned rustc/cargo/pytest/tmux/asciinema; offline deps baked in
local authoring artifact mirroring Construction manifest

task_files.role: oracle frontier A — weak dependency feature fold
oracle frontier B — path dependency edge normalization
oracle frontier C — JSON row vs dep-info sidecar bridge
oracle frontier D — first-build order permutation driver
fm_run entry and matrix_digest reduction header
shared path dependency with feature table
weak and strong edge seed rows
feature ladder weights for sensitivity drills

fix_frontier.distribution: environment/w2k/src/weak_mux.rs, environment/p3n/src/edge_mux.rs, environment/c8r/src/fold_mux.rs, environment/h5k/src/order_drv.rs across w2k, p3n, c8r, h5k roots
fix_frontier.naming_policy: Opaque identifiers fn_w2, fn_p3, fn_c8, fn_h5 on neutral parameter names; no instruction nouns on fix path
fix_frontier.helpers_policy: Decoys in w2k, p3n, c8r perform credible adjacent diagnostics; frontier stays thin at four symbols with engine/resolver orchestration separate

forbidden_assertion_styles: readiness fields named *_ok in instruction prose tied 1:1 to fix-path grep

task_shape.hardness_source: design search across coupled Cargo workspace feature resolution under permuted first-build order
task_shape.collapse_risk: blank-canvas build with no binding cross-component constraints

category_profile.allowed_instruction_disclosures: locked offline Cargo commands, feature_matrix_report artifact identity, platform matrix via perm_order generalization, mirror pair coherence predicates, operator_cmds argv, formal_rules schema, digest formula home in main.rs header
category_profile.forbidden_instruction_leaks: weak-vs-strong fold site, path-edge leak location, workspace resolver override wiring, patch functions, per-scenario facet answers, canonical recovery sequence
category_profile.category_specific_hardness_bar: Lockfile, workspace manifests, shared path-dep feature table, order driver, dep-info sidecars, and cache-visible probes must coordinate; one version bump or one manifest row cannot pass ablation and perm_order suites
category_profile.category_specific_verifier_risks: pin-one-dep fix, clean-build-only pass, static JSON satisfying format without rebuild, false-green health subcommand without durable sidecar convergence
category_profile.coverage_role: Strengthens build_dependency_toolchain coverage via cargo workspace feature unification order constrained-build topology

satisfiability_risk.rc2_planned_name_risk: low — opaque crate roots h5k/p3n/w2k/c8r and neutral fn_* symbols committed
satisfiability_risk.gx9_contract_risk: low — tests derive verdicts from matrix_digest recompute and mirror equality, not per-target answer tables in instruction
satisfiability_risk.cr1_symbol_frontier_risk: low — four substantive Rust modules plus explicit flipping-point contract
satisfiability_risk.hidden_contract_risk: medium — cross-artifact dep-info invariants live in runtime sidecars; instruction states binding obligation without byte-level recipe

actionability_plan.verifier_command_visible: locked cargo build/test workflow and /app/bin/fm_run documented in operator_cmds.txt and formal_rules.md
actionability_plan.source_fix_intent_visible: yes — complete sources under /app/environment without naming modules
actionability_plan.exact_formula_home: module comment above environment/h5k/src/main.rs for matrix_digest and span_band reduction

waiver_plan.waiver_rationale: Hardness from coupled Cargo feature-graph behavior and observation-shaped contracts; deterministic offline rebuilds avoid harness brittleness waivers

reference_pattern.justification_if_none: No promoted entry in docs/reference_tasks/index.json matches cargo workspace feature unification under resolver-2 weak-dep semantics with permuted first-build order. Incremental-build and hermetic-sandbox molds share verifier trap patterns but differ in topology (feature matrix vs provenance audit vs sandbox phases); this spec commits a distinct four-root Rust/Cargo workspace design without cloning a reference task file tree.

realism_source.upstream_or_synthetic_rationale: Minimized from production Cargo/Rust workspace resolver-2 discussions where weak dependency features, default-features=false members, and workspace-level resolver settings yield order-dependent unified feature sets (rust-lang/cargo feature resolver threads)
realism_source.minimization_preserves: Weak-vs-strong unification split, path-dep feature leak despite default-features disable, workspace-root resolver precedence over member tables, false-green cargo check-style probes, cross-format JSON vs dep-info invariants
